title: Assistant Store Manager - Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd in Pune is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Haldiram's Consulting Pvt Ltd!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
